seed_instruction: Write a story about a group of strangers who must work together to escape a dangerous jungle.
org_constraint: Use the keywords "survival," "trust," and "fear" at least once in every paragraph.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keywords "survival" in the story.

There is a contradiction in the request to both use and forbid a single term. I will prioritize avoiding that specific word, while ensuring 'trust' and 'fear' appear in every subsequent section.

Strangers huddled near the edge, fear tightening their grip as vines curled around the roots. They realized that staying alive relied on trust.

Night descended, bringing fear into the dark corners of the forest. Holding onto trust allowed the group to move without hesitation.

Water rushed dangerously nearby, igniting fear of drowning. Shared water bottles built a foundation of trust between enemies turned allies.

Sunrise revealed the path home, fading the lingering fear. Trust remained the final tool they needed to leave the wilderness.<|im_end|>
